source.section: Part 15 - Navigation & Case III Recovery > 5 - Waypoints > 5.2 - Waypoint Navigation

steps.action: Press the OSB (Option Select Button) next to WYPT to set tracking mode to WAYPOINT.
steps.voiced: Press the OSB next to WYPT.

steps.action: Select desired waypoint sequence by pressing the OSB next to SEQ#. We will pick Sequence 1. To display the sequence lines, press on the OSB again to make the SEQ1 text boxed.
steps.voiced: Press the OSB next to SEQ1, then press it again to box the sequence.

steps.action: To select a waypoint, press the OSBs to increment or decrement the waypoint number.
steps.voiced: Press the increment or decrement OSBs to select your waypoint.

steps.action: Use the HSI and HUD to navigate towards waypoint Waypoint Selected (Waypoint 1) Waypoint Data Bearing (degrees) Distance (Nm) Time-to-Go to Waypoint (minutes:seconds) WYPT Waypoint Selected (Boxed) Waypoint Decrement Waypoint Increment Waypoint Sequence 1 (Boxed) Aircraft (top down view) Waypoint 1 (Selected) TO Waypoint 1 Bearing Aircraft Heading FROM Waypoint 1 Bearing Waypoint Sequence 1 Lines Waypoint Sequence 1 Bearing Waypoint 1 (Selected) Distance to Waypoint 1 (nm) Aircraft Heading Heading Scale 5 - WAYPOINTS
steps.voiced: Navigate to the selected waypoint using the HSI and HUD.
